quoted_text:
Hedge funds are aggressively betting on lower oil prices:

Hedge fund net short bets on Brent crude oil are up to ~$18 billion, the highest in at least 10 years.

This figure has more than TRIPLED over the last 3 months.

This comes as hedge funds and institutional investors sold -$7.5 billion of Brent crude oil in the week ending June 16th, the largest weekly sale since April 2025.

New short positions accounted for ~80% of total sales during the week, meaning most of the sales came from fresh

text:
UAE exports may have recovered to 85% of pre-war levels, but that's a flow number, not a system recovery.

The real questions are sustainability, inventories, insurance, and whether markets still believe Hormuz can close again tomorrow.

#Oil #Hormuz #OOTT #Energy #Brent #Geopolitics
https://t.co/ZHow9ePzNX

Macquarie says the market is underestimating the oil market's ability to heal itself.

Perhaps. But flows are recovering faster than confidence.

The real bottleneck isn't oil. 

It's trust that Hormuz won't become tomorrow's crisis again.

#Oil #Hormuz #OOTT #Brent #Energy #Geopolitics
https://t.co/Wql3PoGUZ8

The case for #OPEC's long-term #oil demand growth and investment in hydrocarbons remains strong, but the Middle East conflict has created new forms of doubt. #OOTT #oilandgas
https://t.co/2JtzO4pkE6 https://t.co/ODc9LzKqYI

Hormuz may be reopening, but that doesn't mean the system is healing.

Flows recover faster than production capacity. 

Every detour, delay, and insurance premium raises the cost of Persian Gulf oil.

https://t.co/CDlwbEGRzw

سلطنة عُمان وبالتنسيق مع المنظمة البحرية الدولية تتيح ممر عبور للسفن في مضيق هرمز 

انطلاقًا من مسؤولية سلطنة عُمان تجاه مضيق هرمز وأهميته للاقتصاد العالمي، ووفقًا لالتزامها الثابت بالقانون الدولي وقانون البحار بما يضمن حرية الملاحة في المضيق دون فرض رسوم عبور، وبما يتماشى مع نتائج الجهود والمساعي التي توصلت إليها الولايات المتحدة الأمريكية والجمهورية الإسلامية الإيرانية، فقد عملت سلطنة عُمان بالتنسيق مع المنظمة البحرية الدولية (IMO)، على إتاحة خيار استخدام ممر بحري مؤقت لجميع السفن وفق الإحداثي

quoted_text:
@utopia_escape Flag/pennant top and bottoms don't have to be parallel. 

I'd argue that if you are using daily closing prices we are still within...not that this even matters too much anymore with algos overshooting typical patterns to shake out technical traders stops. 

Instead look for a confluence of signals as it's harder to fake out them all.

quoted_text:
Leonidas: UK Crude Market Open Brief
ICE Brent (AUG) is trading ~$76.35/bbl, extending losses for a fourth session and now below the pre-war Feb 27 close. The regime change from disruption premium to oversupply pricing is confirmed. Overnight, Oman announced a temporary IMO-backed maritime corridor through Hormuz; crossings nearly tripled w/w to 93 vessels (June 19–21). Trump confirmed 19m barrels transited in a single day and pledged no further naval blockade. Brent settled $77.08 on Tuesday —
